headline: 2 Reasons Why Western Digital Stock Could Keep Climbing In 2026
summary: While Western Digital stock has rallied significantly, two key factors suggest it may have further upside potential in 2026 and beyond.

headline: Memory Is Wall Street’s Favorite Tech Trade as Mag 7 Disappoints
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the stock market’s volatile and uncertain start to the year, one trade has held strong: go long memory and storage.Companies like Sandisk Corp., Western Digital Corp., and Seagate Technology Holdings Plc are among the leaders in the S&P 500 Index in 2026, even with their recent declines, as heavy spending on artificial intelligence creates insatiable demand for memory and storage components used in data centers. headline: Super Micro (SMCI) Moves 5.1% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Super Micro (SMCI) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
